item.title: Pioneer VSX-D458 5.1 Channel Stereo/Surround Receiver - $79 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful Pioneer VSX-D458 5.1 channel receiver. 100 watts on all 5 channels. Powerful and sounds excellent. Has a phono section for your turntable. Very nice cosmetic condition and works great. Remote control works well and has no corrosion in the battery compartment. Fully tested. I can demo it in my garage. Owner's manual available online. Nice receiver for $79 firm.

item.title: HH Scott AM/FM Stereo Receiver 325R-Vintage 70's Very Nice! - $125 (Warren RI)
item.description: Collectible condition, Vintage H H Scott AM/FM Stereo receiver Model 325R.

item.title: Pioneer SX-6 System - $250 (Warwick)
item.description: Complete package

item.title: Vintage Audiophile Stereo Gear: Amp, Pre-amp, Cassette Deck, Speakers - $200 (Bristol)
item.description: PS Audio 5.0 pre-amplifier with external power supply. $200

item.title: FOR SALE: MICRO SEIKI DD-40 TURNTABLE - $1,600
item.description: Up for sale one Micro Seiki DD-40 turntable in nice condition with original box and manual. Also, in good condition original dust cover, 45-RPM adapter and removable headshell. Comes with Ortofon VMS-30 cartridge. The plinth is rosewood veneer in excellent condition. I am the original owner purchased new in 1977. The turntable is 43 years old and has been sitting in the original box for over 15 years. There is a couple of small cracks near the dust cover hinges (see images). From a smoke free home. The turntable is sold as is per my description NO RETURNS.

item.title: Denon Receiver - $200
item.description: Denon Home Theater Receiver. Not much use on it, used it as a 2nd system in the house. Plenty of HDMI ports, My man cave has recently been turned into a kids playroom so no need for this anymore. Will sell for $200

item.title: Dennon Surround Receiver - $175 (Smithfield)
item.description: Dennon Surround Receiver with remote like new. $175

item.title: Portable Turntable/Record Player - $50 (Woonsocket)
item.description: CR6002A-BK

item.title: I Buy Vintage Stereo Equipment - Receivers, Speakers Etc... - $100 (Cranston)
item.description: I like to buy, tinker with and collect vintage stereo equipment. I like old receivers, speakers, turntables, tape decks, cd players etc... I'll even buy some broken stuff (depending what it is). Let me know what you have and where it is located. You can email me through craigslist or call or text the phone number that comes up when you click "reply" at the top left corner of my ad. Thanks, Bill

item.title: Adcom GTP-500 II Stereo AM/FM Tuner Preamplifier - $199 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful Adcom GTP-500 II stereo tuner preamp with remote control in excellent condition and sounds fantastic. Has phono input for your turntable plus 3 other inputs. Hooked up in my garage for demonstration. I also have a nice Adcom amplifier for sale. Great preamp for $199 firm.

item.title: Adcom GFA-545 II Stereo Power Amplifier - $240 (Cranston)
item.description: Fantastic Adcom GFA-545 II stereo power amplifier in excellent condition. Works great and sounds amazing. 100 watts per channel. Hooked up in my garage for demonstration. I also have a nice Adcom preamp for sale. Beautiful amp for $240 firm.

item.title: JVC-Turntable AL-A158BKX-With Upgraded AT 3003 Cartridge- - $75 (Warren RI)
item.description: I have a JVC Model AL-A158BKX auto return turntable/record player in excellent working & cosmetic condition.

item.description: I am selling this 1970s JVC model VL-5 turntable that has not been used for many years. Any questions text or call 508-287-969

item.title: Galaxy Audio Any Spot Stero wireless In Ear Monitors - $275 (providence)
item.description: Used only 2 times like new priced to sell.Retail new for $329.99 plus Tax . The Galaxy Audio AS-1200 is a durable, reliable, high-fidelity monitoring system that will have your band playing their best! This system includes an AS-1200T transmitter with 210 selectable UHF frequencies, stereo or mono transmission, and a backlit LCD display. The AS-1200R receiver comes equipped with a built-in limiter and a backlit LCD display. If you're looking to expand your set in the future, the AS-1200 system is designed to work with ensembles of any size, pairing with an unlimited number of additional receivers.

item.title: NAD 7255PE AM/FM Stereo Integrated Amplfier - $125 (Cranston)
item.description: The NAD 7225PE is an integrated amplifier with AM/FM stereo tuner introduced in 1988. Features 25 W per channel, two sets of speaker outputs, built-in phono preamp for a turnable connection. Output was measured to be ~32 - 36W per channel and sounds great!

item.title: Crown CST-4200 - $100 (North Kingstown)
item.description: The Crown CST-4200 is a top-of-the-line commercial stereo power amplifier that delivers exceptional audio performance for various applications. Whether you're setting up a professional sound system in a venue, studio, or home entertainment space, the CST-4200 offers robust power and clarity. With its reliable Crown engineering and reputation for quality, this amplifier is designed to meet the demands of audio enthusiasts and professionals alike.

item.title: Vintage Radio Shack / Realistic / Micronta Hoard - $150 (Wrentham)
item.description: This is all stuff that I've used at some point in my distant past. Everything is branded as indicated. It is all at least 35 years old and everything works except the 12" speakers. Included in the lot:

item.title: Mutron Bi-Phase sound chart overlays - $75 (Westerly)
item.description: I have the 3 original sound chart overlays for the Mutron Bi-phase, a high end vintage phasor from the 1970's. These cardboard overlays fit on top of the knobs and switches on the unit to indicate the proper settings.

item.title: Olympus S725 Pearlcorder Microcassette Recorder - $70 (West Warwick, RI)
item.description: The Olympus S725 Pearlcorder Microcassette Recorder comes with voice activation so you can utilize it "hands-free" recording if desired. It also features fast play mode for playback that is 25-percent faster, and external jacks for a remote control, headphones, earphones, and AC power.

item.title: 2016 HARLEY DAVIDSON ROAD GLIDE ULTRA - $13,999 (Portsmouth RI)
item.description: 2016 Harley Davidson Road Glide Ultra, only 12,300 miles. Original owner. Garaged, covered. All services done at Harley Davidson. Additional items. Screaming Eagle high flow ventilation air cleaner, driver back rest, highway pegs, chrome passenger footrest covers, rear tire replace at 9096 miles, lithium battery installed at 10547 miles, Screaming Eagle muffler, end caps and stage one tuning kit. Quick release for trunk and passenger backrest. Additional negotiable items. Full face HD helmet, two women's half helmets in excellent condition, lithium battery charger, two men's HD riding jackets. Premium HD stereo helmet headset. HD full helmet music and communication headset, HD motorcycle cover, bladder suspension pump. Kelly Blue book lists at $21,100. Motivated seller, call me.

item.title: KENWOOD & Realistic receivers - $160 (Warwick)
item.description: I have two receivers, both in excellent condition and working as they should, The Kenwood was serviced less than a week ago, I thought I was going to put it into my rack and use it after sitting so long, but decided I wanted something newer.
